title: Impossible
overview: The Azatoth Empire’s Thrale research vessel approaches Earth. Its captain Liza Luna makes the command to deploy the ToxiCloud and purge all lifeforms from the planet!

title: Trapped
overview: The Azatoth Empire's reign spans a myriad of stars and planets and they've set their sights on Earth. However, they’ve never seen anything as adorable as kitty cats before!

title: No Surrender
overview: Invading alien Liza Luna thought kitty cats were the cutest thing on the whole planet Earth. Just wait until she sees dogs!

title: Unknown
overview: Liza decides to show Kasumi and the others the unknown creature Manuru, ranked 1st for 128 consecutive years in the ranking of the cutest animals in the universe! Then linguistic analysis specialist Fiana receives a request from Liza to translate the language of cats.

title: Favorite
overview: Liza learns that sweet little kitty cats are related to lions and tigers, gigantic kings of the jungle! She just HAS to investigate!

title: Capyba-Llama
overview: It happened in the middle of the night, when most people were fast asleep. Liza found herself tortured by an overwhelming urge and soon succumbed to it.

title: Return to Base
overview: Liza goes hard on cat merch! Even her teacups are cat shaped. She can't help but collect them. Such is the fate of cat owners.

title: Fateful Encounter
overview: So many fur babies, so little time! There’s no shortage of sweet doggos, cute kitties and beautiful bunnies. Who’s going to grab the most attention?

title: Outcast
overview: Liza sets her sights on a new obsession: bunnies! Their cuteness can only be described as otherworldly.

title: Trending
overview: Liza wants to show you her cat pictures. Please? Look at this sweet little kitty cat!

title: Warriors
overview: Mithra isn’t the biggest fan of Mecha-Yozora, so Liza believes she might be able to withstand the cuteness of cats.

title: TOO CUTE
overview: Things are going to get ugly before they return to cuteness in the finale of Too Cute Crisis!
